title: Open the app and navigate to the MOVIES screen
test_steps: Open the Movie Streaming App | Navigate to the MOVIES screen
expected_result: The MOVIES screen should be displayed with a list of movies

title: Search for a specific movie
test_steps: Click on the search icon in the header | Enter 'Christmas on the Bayou' in the search bar | Press enter to perform the search
expected_result: The search results should display 'Christmas on the Bayou'

title: Click on a movie title to view details
test_steps: Click on the title 'Christmas on the Bayou'
expected_result: The app should navigate to the movie details page for 'Christmas on the Bayou'

title: Check if the app can handle empty search results
test_steps: Click on the search icon in the header | Enter 'Nonexistent Movie' in the search bar | Press enter to perform the search
expected_result: The app should display a message indicating no results found

title: Check if the app can handle invalid search terms
test_steps: Click on the search icon in the header | Enter '12345' in the search bar | Press enter to perform the search
expected_result: The app should display a message indicating an invalid search term

title: Check if the app can handle navigation between screens
test_steps: Navigate to the MOVIES screen | Click on the title 'Christmas on the Bayou' | Navigate back to the MOVIES screen
expected_result: The MOVIES screen should be displayed again

title: Check if the app can handle data persistence
test_steps: Navigate to the MOVIES screen | Click on the title 'Christmas on the Bayou' | Navigate back to the MOVIES screen | Close the app and reopen it | Navigate to the MOVIES screen
expected_result: The MOVIES screen should be displayed with the same list of movies

title: Check if the app can handle interruption and resume
test_steps: Navigate to the MOVIES screen | Click on the title 'Christmas on the Bayou' | Simulate an interruption (e.g., phone call) | Resume the app | Navigate back to the MOVIES screen
expected_result: The MOVIES screen should be displayed with the same list of movies
